# opnsense_auth_group (Resource)

Manages a local group on OPNsense.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Group name (unique).

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description.
- `members` (Set of String) Member user UUIDs.
- `privileges` (Set of String) Assigned privilege identifiers.
- `source_networks` (Set of String) Restrict logins to these networks (CIDR).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier.
